tech.title: Tech Stack
tech.subtitle: Tools and technologies I use to build full-stack apps and automations.

automation.title: Automation Developer
automation.description: I design and build automated workflows that eliminate manual work — connecting CRMs, payment systems, AI models and internal tools to keep businesses running 24/7.

items.descripcion: Galileo Psicólogos is a full-stack web application designed to provide an accessible and seamless digital experience for patients, focused on mental health services..
It is an AI-powered property management platform for private landlords that manages and solves different areas of concern for property owners.
AirB2B is a full-stack application inspired by Airbnb, focused on corporate accommodation.
An application to search for and post second-hand instrument ads and music groups.

caseStudies.title: Professional Case Studies
caseStudies.subtitle: A selection of automation projects delivered under NDA. Client names and screenshots are omitted; the technical and business outcomes are real.

items.problema: The clinic was managing 100+ daily appointments by phone and email, with a high no-show rate and frequent scheduling errors.
items.solucion: n8n workflow syncing calendar, WhatsApp Business, email and CRM. Automatic confirmation 24h in advance, self-service rescheduling and AI-powered triage.

items.problema: Stock mismatches between WordPress/WooCommerce, the supplier's ERP and the physical store caused overselling and weekly manual reports.
items.solucion: Automated pipeline that syncs stock in real time between WooCommerce and the ERP, generates daily reports and alerts on anomalies via Slack.

items.problema: The sales team manually qualified hundreds of leads from web, ads and events, with response times of 24–48 hours.
items.solucion: Workflow that captures leads, enriches them with public data, scores them with AI and triggers personalized email sequences in Brevo.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, collaborations, or just having a chat about tech. Feel free to reach out!
contact.ctaSubtitle: Let's discuss your next project and see how I can help bring your ideas to life.
